subcodes.first_line: O thou whose countenance is illumined with the light of the Covenant! How excellent is that which ye have accomplished in the Concourse on High, and how true is that whereof ye have spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اضاء وجهه بنور المیثاق قد حسن ما اجریتم الملا الاعلی و صدق ما نطقتم به
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
